case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. JEFFREY W EVANS

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-29-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
